root.rep_text: รายการประจำวัน (A3)
root.sql: select sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type, sc_acc_m_ucf_doc_type.doc_name, sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date, sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.branch_id , sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_no, sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year from sc_acc_journal_heading_firm, sc_acc_m_ucf_doc_type, sc_acc_m_account_begin, sc_com_m_branch, sc_acc_m_account_year where ( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.doc_type = sc_acc_m_ucf_doc_type.doc_type ) and sc_acc_m_account_begin.branch_id = sc_com_m_branch.branch_id and sc_acc_m_account_begin.account_year = sc_acc_m_account_year.account_year /*and ( ( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.branch_id = :as_branchid )*/ /*and ( sc_acc_journal_heading_firm.journal_date between :adtm_startdate and :adtm_enddate ) )*/ /*WHERE*/
